name: Indirect-detection limits from dwarf galaxy stacking (Fermi-LAT)
requirement: Any candidate framework predicting dark-matter annihilation must respect the gamma-ray upper limits from Fermi-LAT stacking of Milky Way dwarf spheroidal galaxies. For m_DM ~ 100 GeV annihilating to b b_bar, <sigma v> < 5 x 10^-26 cm^3/s (95% CL), reaching the canonical thermal-relic value sigma v ~ 3 x 10^-26 cm^3/s for m_DM > ~100 GeV.

regime.description: Galactic-halo to dwarf-galaxy DM densities; gamma-rays from DM annihilation in nearby DM-dominated systems.

current_bound.value: <sigma v> < 5e-26 cm^3/s for m_DM ~ 100 GeV (b b_bar channel)
current_bound.reference: Albert et al. (Fermi-LAT), 'Searching for Dark Matter Annihilation from Milky Way Dwarf Spheroidal Galaxies with Six Years of Fermi Large Area Telescope Data', ApJ 834, 110 (2017), arXiv:1611.03184

what_it_excludes: Excludes thermal-relic WIMPs annihilating to standard-model gauge bosons with m_DM < ~100 GeV. Constrains cosmic-ray-positron-excess explanations of AMS-02 / PAMELA in terms of DM annihilation. Combined with HESS, MAGIC, VERITAS, and CTA limits, leaves narrow regions of WIMP parameter space.

parameterization.name: Annihilation cross-section <sigma v> per channel (b b_bar, tau+ tau-, W+ W-, mu+ mu-, etc.); J-factor of each dwarf integrated over line-of-sight density-squared.
parameterization.reference: Bertone, Hooper, Silk, Phys. Rep. 405, 279 (2005); Geringer-Sameth, Koushiappas, Walker, ApJ 801, 74 (2015) (J-factors).
parameterization.summary: Predicted gamma-ray flux from a dwarf spheroidal: dPhi/dE = (sigma v / 8 pi m_DM^2) * dN_gamma/dE * J-factor.

procedural.predicted_observable: Stacked gamma-ray excess in dwarf spheroidals; absence of signal sets upper limit on <sigma v>.
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: Channel-dependent; b b_bar bound is most stringent at <sigma v> < 5e-26 cm^3/s for 100 GeV DM.
framework_inputs: Annihilation cross sections per final-state channel.
Predicted photon spectrum dN_gamma / dE per channel (tools: PPPC4DMID by Cirelli et al.).

primary_references.citation: Albert et al. (Fermi-LAT), 'Searching for Dark Matter Annihilation from Milky Way Dwarf Spheroidal Galaxies with Six Years of Fermi Large Area Telescope Data', ApJ 834, 110 (2017)
Cirelli et al., 'PPPC 4 DM ID: A Poor Particle Physicist Cookbook for Dark Matter Indirect Detection', JCAP 03, 051 (2011)
